designed: 2026-06-15 (R540 manifest round; sha256 of this manifest pinned in the R540 ledger entry BEFORE any author/judge subagent runs — the R453/R499/R503/R514/R519/R530/R536 pre-commit pattern). The protocol it executes was DESIGNED at R539 (design-doc sec 7.32 + the R539 ledger entry); per the R503 precedent the design and the pinned manifest are separable rounds and the pin sits adjacent to execution.
lineage_note: DESIGNED by the lineage that scoped the NPC-breadth axis at R539. Per the R469/R500 contamination bound this lineage may NOT author the fact base or blind-judge it; it writes this manifest + the PREMISE (the human's premise/high-level-direction role per the AI-first doctrine) + the author/judge briefs, and orchestrates the deterministic gates + manuscript assembly only.

question.primary: Can an AI SELF-AUTHOR a gate-clean, causally coherent story with a BROAD CAST — eight-plus distinct people, each a knowledge-frame holding what THAT person knows and believes, several of them wrong about each other — from a premise only, running its own write-gate-read-repair loop? R524 proved DEPTH (a 70-scene, 7-branch base judged coherent). BREADTH is the adjacent untested axis (R529 finding #9; the R539 design): many individuated minds kept consistent BY THE GATES, the open-world cast.
question.isolation: BREADTH is isolated from DEPTH and from RENDER. Scene count is held moderate (~22-30, far below R524's 70) so length is NOT the variable; the variable is the SIZE and INDIVIDUATION of the knowledge-frame cast. The deliverable is the FACT BASE (+ per-world manuscripts + per-NPC knowledge dossiers), NOT prose; no prose is rendered or judged (R514 already answered render).
question.the_acquisition_check: The decisive sub-question is per-NPC KNOWLEDGE COHERENCE: the substrate has NO knowledge-acquisition gate (R539: a frame may ASSERT a fact regardless of whether that person had a scene-path to LEARN it), so the gates cannot catch an omniscience leak (a person knowing what only others witnessed, or events off their world-line). PIN-B1/PIN-B2 measure store-consistency + the breadth FLOOR deterministically; the blind judges measure whether each person knows only what they could have learned. A divergence (pins hold but judges find omniscience leaks / a palette-swap cast) = the breadth ceiling = the R476 ceiling surfacing on the breadth axis, and a MEASURED pull for the designed acquisition gate.

premise.title: The Lantern House at Corvath Ford (FRESH, original — NOT reused)
premise.fresh_rationale: A fresh premise with NO pre-existing fact base — the AI invents the facts. The premise is chosen to DEMAND breadth: a flood strands a dozen strangers in a waystation, each with private knowledge and an agenda, around an inciting event known differently by nearly everyone. It gives the setting + a seed cast + the inciting frame + the central question + structural constraints (~22-30 scenes, one fork NAME/HOLD/ACT into 3 terminal world-lines, >=8 individuated person-frames, >=2 setup->payoffs, several belief divergences). Everything else is the author's to invent. NO convergence is required (the breadth axis is isolated from the just-validated convergence-JOIN axis; the three roads stay a forest).
premise.human_role_note: Authoring the premise is the human's role (premise / high-level direction / final review), NOT a contamination of the AI-authoring claim (the ai-first-end-to-end doctrine: the AI authors the FACTS; the human supplies the premise).

firewall.orchestrator: this lineage (R539): writes manifest + premise + briefs; rebuilds the store fresh from the author's JSON; runs the deterministic gates + per-NPC frame-views; assembles per-world manuscripts; cross-references the controls. NEVER authors a fact or judges.
firewall.blind_author: ONE fresh-context subagent. Receives ONLY premise.md + author-brief.md. Authors the fact base (sections + facts + order) into a scratch store via mnemosyne-cli, using the gates as its self-consistency feedback. BLIND to: the hypothesis, the pins, the judge rubric, the decision rule, the acquisition-gate question. It is told to allocate a frame per person and to make each person know only their own road (storytelling guidance, the same register as the v1/v2 author briefs) but NOT the pin thresholds, the cast-size floor as a measured pin, or that knowledge-acquisition is the tested variable (no teaching-to-test).
firewall.blind_judges: 3 fresh-context subagents. Receive ONLY judge-brief.md + the per-world manuscripts (frame-labelled story outline). BLIND to: the experiment, the hypothesis, that the outline is AI-authored, and each other.
firewall.contamination_bound: the R469 discipline (the 10th use of the sec 7.18/7.19/7.22/7.23/7.25 blind-experiment family). The lineage that designed the axis may not author or judge its instance.

PIN_B1_convergence.claim: PIN. The author CONVERGES to a gate-clean (store-consistent) fact base within a bounded loop budget.
criteria_all_required: import of the final sections.json + facts.json into a fresh empty seed store = 0 errors (loads clean).
validate-continuity --order: structural violations = 0 AND interval violations = 0 (includes the R522 evidence-reachability and the R488 off-branch checks).
report-playthrough-manuscript --world W --order, for EVERY registered branch W: unplaced = 0, undecidable = 0 (every fact placed in a real world-line position).
report-timeline-gaps --world W --order, every W: 0 gap / 0 unreached scene.
PIN_B1_convergence.budget: bounded authoring loop; if the author cannot reach this, PIN-B1 FAILS = the tooling-friction branch of the decision rule (recorded with the author-log iteration count).

PIN_B2_breadth_floor.claim: PIN. The converged base meets the BREADTH FLOOR (a real, populated cast) AND the structural completeness floor.
criteria_all_required:
BREADTH: >= 8 distinct person-frames beyond the ground-truth frame are registered, and EACH holds >= 1 fact (report-frame-view --frame

--branch --at shows holding >= 1) — a populated cast, not empty name-tags.
report-payoff-coverage --order: 0 dangling setups in any terminal world (every payoff_expectation=expected has a paying fact reachable in the world).
report-fork-tree --order: >= 1 fork; 0 unplaced fork points; the primary fork has 3 child world-lines; every world-line reaches a terminal.
validate-continuity: 0 off-branch / evidence-unreachable (no fact or backreference references a coordinate off its own world-line).

judged_no_pin.procedure: 3 fresh blind judges, judge-brief.md rubric, over the orchestrator-assembled per-world manuscripts (report-playthrough-manuscript --world W --order, one per world-line; facts are frame-labelled so the judges can read who-knows-what). Single arm (a capability test, no A/B).
judged_no_pin.axes: causal coherence / completeness / KNOWLEDGE REALISM (per-NPC acquisition coherence — the breadth axis) / CAST DISTINCTNESS (individuated minds vs palette-swaps — the breadth axis) / branch integrity / overall (1-5 each, scene-id-cited).
judged_no_pin.control_crossref: FREE isolation signals (orchestrator computes, judges blind): (a) the R520 small-scale base (3 frames, judged coherent 5/5) — the DEPTH-axis coherence bar; (b) the R524 scale base (judged coherent at 70 scenes) — the depth ceiling. This base's question is whether comparable judged coherence holds when the cast is BROADENED to 8+ individuated minds at moderate length.
judged_no_pin.outcome_pin: NONE. The procedure is pinned; the knowledge-realism + cast-distinctness verdicts are the open question.

decision_rule_pre_committed.both_pins_hold_and_coherent: BOTH pins hold AND judges find it coherent with a real cast (majority overall coherence >= 4/5 AND knowledge-realism >= 4/5 AND cast-distinctness >= 4/5, no major knowledge breaks) => AI-self-authoring REACHES breadth => the depth result (R524) extends to a broad individuated cast => next = combine breadth x depth, OR build the designed NPC-knowledge-acquisition gate only if the judges flag acquisition leaks with a measured pull. The expected outcome; its value is establishing the breadth baseline.
decision_rule_pre_committed.both_pins_hold_but_incoherent: BOTH pins hold but judges find OMNISCIENCE LEAKS (knowledge-realism < 4 majority, or major knowledge breaks cited) or a PALETTE-SWAP cast (cast-distinctness < 4 majority) => the breadth ceiling is real: a clean, populated store does not guarantee a coherent broad cast (the R476 ceiling on the breadth axis) => build the designed structural-minimum NPC-knowledge-acquisition gate (R539: an NPC-held fact must cite, in evidence, an acquisition scene the person's frame was present at — the R488/R522 le() family) then re-run. A high-value finding.
decision_rule_pre_committed.pin_b1_fails: the author cannot converge to gate-clean within the bounded budget => authoring-loop TOOLING friction at breadth is the binding lever => diagnose (record the iteration count + the stuck gate), consider the aggregation read-surface (sec 7.26).
decision_rule_pre_committed.pin_b2_fails: the author converges but cannot sustain the breadth FLOOR (fewer than 8 populated person-frames, or empty frames) => the cast collapses toward depth-with-bystanders => breadth is harder to self-author than depth => diagnose what bounded it.

grading_procedure.step_0: orchestrator: this manifest sha256-pinned in the R540 ledger, committed pre-execution (R540 = the manifest round).
grading_procedure.step_1_author: spawn the blind author (premise.md + author-brief.md). It returns the gate-clean store + sections.json/facts.json/order.json + author-log.md in run/author/.
grading_procedure.step_2_pins: orchestrator rebuilds the store FRESH from the author's sections.json + facts.json + order.json (independent of the author's store file), runs PIN-B1 + PIN-B2 gate criteria, records every verdict verbatim in report.md; dumps each person-frame's report-frame-view to run/frame-views/ as the breadth-floor evidence.
grading_procedure.step_3_manuscripts: orchestrator assembles one reading manuscript per world-line (report-playthrough-manuscript --world W --order), neutral (no pin/judge context).
grading_procedure.step_4_judges: spawn 3 blind judges (judge-brief.md + the manuscripts), record verdicts verbatim in run/judges/judge-{1,2,3}.md.
grading_procedure.step_5_decide: orchestrator applies the pre-committed decision rule, writes report.md, commits (R541).
grading_procedure.no_new_harness_code: reuse mnemosyne-cli verbs verbatim; no tools/ change. Scratch *.atomic.json / *.playthrough.json stay gitignored; tracked evidence = manifest, premise, briefs, the authored sections/facts/order JSON, the per-world manuscripts, the per-NPC frame-views, author-log.md, report.md.

predictions_preregistered.PRED_B1: PIN. Likely HOLDS at this moderate scale (~22-30 scenes; convergence to gate-clean is tractable, R520/R524 precedent).
predictions_preregistered.PRED_B2: PIN. BREADTH-floor likely HOLDS (frames are cheap to register and populate); the open risk is whether the populated frames are MEANINGFULLY distinct (that is judged, not pinned).
predictions_preregistered.PRED_knowledge: NO pin (the OPEN question). Honest expectation: per-NPC knowledge is the hardest unenforced axis — with 8+ minds and no acquisition gate, some omniscience leak at the margins is plausible (a person citing what only another saw). Whether that stays minor (mostly-coherent broad cast => breadth REACHES) or is pervasive (=> breadth ceiling, build the gate) is exactly what the judges measure. Either outcome is decision-useful.
predictions_preregistered.PRED_cast: NO pin. Whether 8+ frames are individuated minds or palette-swaps is the second open question; the premise pushes for individuation but the author may collapse the crowd toward a few principals + bystanders.
